Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Shortbread Cookies

Yield 1 dozen
Preparation time 15m
Cook time 10m
Ingredients
  • 142g unsalted butter, softened
  • 1/2 tsp pure vanilla extract
  • 60g confectioners sugar
  • 1/2 tsp kosher salt
  • 180g all-purpose flour
Instructions
  1. Using paddle attachment in mixer, cream butter and vanilla extract
  2. Add confectioners sugar and salt; mix until combined
  3. On low, mix in flour, scraping bowl when necessary
  4. Shape dough into rectangular prism, wrap in plastic wrap and chill until firm, at least an hour
  5. Preheat oven to 350 F
  6. Cut into ½ inch thick slices
  7. Use fork or skewer to indent pattern onto top
  8. Bake for 10 minutes, rotating sheet halfway through
